critical_findings.title: Metadata fields are not machine-consistent
critical_findings.description: Review markdown files do not share an enforceable metadata header contract.
critical_findings.why_dangerous: Automation cannot deterministically parse module, decision, and trust fields.
critical_findings.failure_scenario: Review retrieval jobs misclassify outcomes and generate incorrect follow-up actions.

required_fixes.description: Adopt and enforce canonical YAML frontmatter metadata keys for every new review markdown artifact.

optional_improvements: Backfill historical review markdown files with standardized frontmatter when practical.
Add CI-level linting for markdown review filenames.
failure_mode_summary: Without a governed schema and frontmatter standard, review-and-fix orchestration remains fragile and ambiguous.
